Title: National Education Policy 2020
Description: Core national education policy transforming Indian education at all levels

Title: NCF School Education 2023
Description: National Curriculum Framework for School Education replacing NCF 2005
Notes: Latest NCERT framework - implementation in progress across grades

Title: NCF Foundational Stage 2022
Description: Curriculum framework for children aged 3-8 (Foundational Stage) - Anganwadi and Grade 1-2

Title: National Assessment Framework
Description: Competency-based assessment framework aligned with NCF 2023

Title: National Digital Education Architecture
Description: NDEAR framework for interoperable digital education ecosystem

Title: NCF Teacher Education 2009
Description: Pre-service and in-service teacher education framework - being updated per NEP 2020

Title: NEP 2020 Teacher Roadmap
Description: Teacher education and development roadmap as per NEP 2020

Title: CBSE Curriculum 2026-27 Classes IX-XII
Description: New NCF-SE 2023 aligned curriculum released by CBSE for Classes IX-XII for academic session 2026-27
Notes: Class IX implements NCF-SE 2023 from 2026-27; Classes XI-XII released April 2026

Title: NCERT New Textbooks Roadmap 2022-2027
Description: Phased rollout of new NCF-SE 2023 aligned textbooks - Classes 1-8 complete; Class 9 in 2026-27; Classes 10-11 in 2027-28
Notes: Advisory issued March 2026; Grade 9 draft available on NCERT website

Title: NCF Curriculum for Preparatory Stage
Description: Curriculum framework for Preparatory Stage (Grades 3-5) aligned with NEP 2020

Title: NCF Curriculum for Middle Stage
Description: Curriculum framework for Middle Stage (Grades 6-8) aligned with NEP 2020 - textbooks released 2025-26
Notes: New textbooks for Grades 4 5 7 8 released March 2025

Title: NCTE NCF Teacher Education Revised
Description: Revised National Curriculum Framework for Teacher Education aligned with NEP 2020 and NCF-SE 2023
Notes: Updated from 2009 version to align with NEP 2020
